Han Xiang ÈüìÁøä
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Xiang (ÈüìÁøä). Deputy Astrologist who assisted Gaotang Long during the reign of Cao Pi. Han Xiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
